/usr/bin/ar qc ../lib/libmdds.a CMakeFiles/mdds.dir/topic.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mdds.dir/domain_participant.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mdds.dir/publisher.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mdds.dir/subscriber.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mdds.dir/data_writer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mdds.dir/data_reader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mdds.dir/data_writer_raw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mdds.dir/data_reader_raw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mdds.dir/discovery.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mdds.dir/discovery_server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mdds.dir/multicast_discovery.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mdds.dir/transport_udp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mdds.dir/transport_shm.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib ../lib/libmdds.a
